use_cases: Display user profile information with avatar and bio in SaaS dashboards
Create animated identity cards for creator profiles and portfolios
Build social profile sections with customizable social links and theming
Showcase team member cards with GSAP-powered entrance animations
Implement user identity displays with dark/light theme support
ai_summary: An animated profile card component featuring GSAP-powered entrance animations, theme-aware styling with CSS variables for accent colors, and customizable social links. Supports avatar display, identity information, and both plain and accented visual schemes. Built with compound component pattern using Radix UI primitives for accessibility.
